adapt.searchForm: ${(()=>{const raw=data||{};return Object.assign({}, searchForm, raw, {page:Number(raw.page||1), size:Number(raw.size||searchForm.size||20), subject: raw.subject || 'english', stage: raw.stage || searchForm.stage || 'junior', grade: raw.grade || searchForm.grade || 'grade_7'});})()}

children.children: 按年级和科目组织知识点

children.options: ${[{label:'全部科目', value:''}].concat((Array.isArray(subjectList) ? subjectList : []).map(item => ({label: item.subject_name || item.subject_code, value: item.subject_code})))}

value.searchForm: ${Object.assign({}, searchForm, {page: 1, stage: row.stage || searchForm.stage || 'junior', grade: row.grade_code || '', unit_id: '', section_id: ''})}

value.pointForm: ${Object.assign({}, pointForm || {}, {stage: row.stage || pointForm.stage || searchForm.stage || 'junior', grade: row.grade_code || 'grade_7', unit_id: '', section_id: ''})}

confirm.title: 确认删除知识点？
confirm.description: ${'确认删除【' + (row.point_name || row.point_code || '未命名知识点') + '】吗？'}

children.placeholder: 输入知识点说明、例句、易错点等内容
